data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Gangster
data.detailed_description:
This game is a continuation of the story in "Dominated by: Yandere Goth Boxer"

After being choked out in the shower by Kurorigi, you wake up in a hidden bedroom closet in Kurorigi's gym with Kurokara waiting by your side. As Kurokara expresses her love for you, you'll have to endure her sadistic love only a few hours after being choked out by Kurorigi. Although she's 28 years older than Kurorigi, Kurokara's sadism, love, energy, and enthusiasm is equal to, if not even greater than Kurorigi's. Experience what it's like to have a 274cm tall, violent, sadistic, yandere, goth gangster be obsessively in love with you.

  • ~3K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 15 Unique character images

  • 22 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
